body.title: Train Igor to music — musical cognition as modality
body.result: Closed per Akien 2026-05-01: another party already did musical-cognition training; their AI will train Igor on it later. Ticket archived to keep queue focused.
body.description:
Akien's idea (2026-04-22): 'Train igor to music.'

This is a vision-level placeholder, not a build-ready ticket. Before sprinting, we need a design conversation about scope and shape. Candidate interpretations:
- Musical training-data ingestion (MIDI, scores, audio features) as a corpus alongside text — Igor learns musical structure like he learns language
- Rhythm/timing/meter as a cognitive primitive (Igor perceives cadence/beat in conversation, actions, habits — a new modality of pattern recognition)
- Performance affordances (Igor playing/composing, not just perceiving) — output channel into music
- Motivational/affective coupling — music as a bliss-integrator input, emotional shape via musical harmony/dissonance

Akien's likely direction (inferred from bliss integrator + Pursuits + milieu work): music as an affective/structural modality that couples to existing cognition, not a new black box. But scope is genuinely open.

Do not sprint until design conversation has narrowed this. Candidate next step: /design session producing a design doc (scope + minimum viable modality + which existing subsystems couple) → /decided spawns 2-4 child tickets.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in design conversation, not in sprint.
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not is TBD until scope is defined — flagged 'design-first, scope-second' per this ticket shape.
**Scope boundary:** IN — parent/placeholder tracking the intent; seeds a /design session. OUT — any implementation code before scope is agreed.
**Test plan:** no tests because: design-phase ticket. Acceptance = a /design doc lands that makes the scope concrete, then this ticket closes with 'decomposed → <child-ticket-ids>'.
